description:
This interactive live wallpaper maps out the entire knockout stage in a beautiful, circular tree grid that automatically synchronizes with live tournament data.

Key Features
Real-Time API Sync: Automatically updates scores and team advancements throughout the tournament without needing any manual setup or API keys.

Interactive Analytics Panel: Click on any active or completed match flag to slide open a sleek, glassmorphic stats sidebar displaying live Possession, Total Shots, Shots on Target, and Corners.

Live Match Alerts: Ongoing games instantly trigger an electric blue breathing pulse animation to show you where the action is happening at a glance.

Dynamic Winner Tracks: Watch the grid pathways permanently light up with vibrant, glowing neon lines styled to match the primary flag color of the advancing team.

Added a breathing pulse animation feature for the cup and grid - play some music and try it out!

Created this based on a post of the world cup by @emiliosansolini on Instagram, do check him out :)
title: FIFA 26:Live Knockouts Revolve
